title: Fix Market Data LIVE zeroed values

requirements.summary: Fix the Market Data LIVE section to display real values (Mid Price, Best Bid, Best Ask, Buy/Sell Levels) instead of dashes or zeros by adding proper error surfacing, retry logic, and fallback behavior when the ICDex quote/order-book fetch fails
acceptanceCriteria: MarketDataPanel displays a non-zero Mid Price when the ICDex canister is reachable.
Best Bid and Best Ask show formatted price values instead of dashes.
Buy Levels and Sell Levels show a count greater than zero when the order book is populated.
If the ICDex fetch fails, an explicit error message (not silent dashes) is shown in the panel.
The panel retries the data fetch automatically on a polling interval consistent with the existing LIVE indicator.

file_operations.description: Enhance the MarketDataPanel component to display Best Bid, Best Ask, Buy Levels, and Sell Levels from the order book data instead of only showing the derived mid price. Add explicit error state handling to show a clear error message when the fetch fails. Ensure the panel surfaces the error from the backend query instead of silently showing dashes. Update the LIVE status indicator logic to reflect fetch success/failure and include retry behavior on the existing polling interval.

Add a new React Query hook (e.g., useMarketData) that fetches market data (mid price, best bid, best ask, order book levels) from the backend. Configure the hook to poll at an interval consistent with the existing LIVE indicator, handle errors explicitly by surfacing the backend error variant, and retry on failure. Ensure that when the backend returns an error variant, the query error state is populated so the MarketDataPanel can display a meaningful error message instead of dashes or zeros.
